## Verification

- [ ] Formatted changed files
- [ ] `bun run verify`
- [ ] Checked changed routes in desktop Chrome
- [ ] Checked every theme enabled by the current theme config
- [ ] Confirmed screenshots contain no secrets or personal/private data
